config.script:
'asp_raport_appfile #include "50518" #include "50101"
function make_raport_zdarzenia_systemowe() dim pRapDef: set pRapDef = doc_.afc.rap.new_rd(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG) pRapDef.title = "Zdarzenia systemowe" with doc_.afc.rap 'dodaj filtr pRapDef.add_filter .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddField("dDataZdarz").root.serialize(1) pRapDef.add_filter .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddField("eTyp").root.serialize(1) pRapDef.add_filter .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddRef("pUser").AddField("strNazwa").root.serialize(1) 'dodaj uporządkowanie pRapDef.add_order .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddField("dDataZdarz").root.serialize(1), true, true, false pRapDef.add_order .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddField("tCzasZdarz").root.serialize(1), true, false, false 'dodaj kolumny pRapDef.add_col .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddField("eTyp").root.serialize(1), true, false pRapDef.add_col .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddField("dDataZdarz").root.serialize(1), false, false pRapDef.add_col .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddField("tCzasZdarz").root.serialize(1), false, false pRapDef.add_col .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddRef("pUser").AddField("strNazwa").root.serialize(1), false, false pRapDef.add_col .new_path(TYPEID_N5EVENTLOG)_ .AddField("strOpis").root.serialize(1), false, false end with
asp_raport_rapdef pRapDef end function
function make_raport_rozl_ob_prac asp_raport_appfile 95444, nothing end function function make_raport_rozl_ob_ob asp_raport_appfile 95445, nothing end function
function fopen() if std_fopen() then #ifdef _SECURITY if trans_.isvar(APPVAR_RAPORT_TYPE) then select case trans_.var(APPVAR_RAPORT_TYPE) case 2 'Rozliczenie obiektów wg pracowników make_raport_rozl_ob_prac case 3 'Rozliczenie obiektów wg obiektów make_raport_rozl_ob_ob end select else make_raport_zdarzenia_systemowe() end if #else #ifdef _ABAKUS if not HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then make_raport_zdarzenia_systemowe() end if #else make_raport_zdarzenia_systemowe() #endif #endif end if fopen = false end function
